category_sources: source_facts.description says Mac App Store command-line interface; official GitHub repository has the same description.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mas; official repository is mas-cli/mas and uses mas as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository exposes a Wiki and README, both official documentation surfaces for the CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mas-cli/mas, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Mac App Store CLI; source_facts.executables lists mas; official repo description matches.
